globalNews.title: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire

cryptoNews.title: Strategy buys back $1.5B of debt at discount, cuts outstanding notes to $6.7B

aiNews.title: The pope’s AI encyclical isn’t really about AI
